_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. The real file must NOT live in this public repo — it belongs only in the private repo the Worker reads from (see access-control/README.md). Every condition's 'field' must be one of the canonical whoami fields loader.js sends: username, email, country, insertSite, langcode, displayName (plus any custom field registered in buckets.json's fieldLevels — see PERMISSIONS_GUIDE.md). 'grants' arrays replace the old single 'tier' string — a user can hold more than one at once (e.g. ["user","dev","beta_0"]). 'beta_0' is a wildcard meaning 'all betas'; any other 'beta_N' gates one specific feature. Omitting 'grants' defaults to ["user"]. 'bucketId' on override/allow/blacklist entries is admin-layer metadata only (which delegated admin group owns this entry) — the live access check never reads it; omit it (or use null) for anything root-owned. blacklist entries are {bucketId, conditions} objects, not bare condition arrays — see the buckets/delegation section of PERMISSIONS_GUIDE.md before hand-adding one.
